name: sentiment_classification
system_prompt: Classify the sentiment of the following text as exactly one of: positive, negative, or neutral. Reply with only the label.

examples.input: The product arrived on time and works perfectly.
The package was damaged and customer support was unhelpful.

samples.input: I absolutely love this product, it exceeded all my expectations!
Terrible experience, the product broke after one day.
The order was processed on Tuesday.
Best purchase I've made all year, highly recommend!
Very disappointed, nothing like what was advertised.
